property.name: text
property.value: The Trader Have Been Ambushed

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF6600]Player's Mind:[-] When I'm ready, I will put the Lure to start the fight

property.name: text
property.value: You Have Been Ambushed

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF6600]Player's Mind:[-] This time I can't decide when to start fighting. I need to act now.

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF6600]Player's Mind:[-] If i remember correct, he said that i need to aim totally vertically, so the arrow with flare can reach high enough for the scout's vision.

property.name: text
property.value: You need to aim TOTALLY VERTICALLY.

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF6600]Player's Mind:[-] Okay, need to shot the flare again.

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF6600]Player's Mind:[-] Oh crap, not high enough.

property.name: text
property.value: Your arrow did not reach enough height.

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF6600]Player's Mind:[-] I got it.

property.name: text
property.value: Your arrow reached enough height.

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF6600]Game:[-] Only take the items of ONE crate.

property.name: text
property.value: Only take the items of ONE crate.

property.name: text
property.value: We have been ambushed

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF6600]Player's Mind:[-] Oh Shit! The Zeds Arrived

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF6600]Trader's Voice:[-] You can't keep inside, go over there! The mission will fail if you insist

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF6600]Game:[-] The time limit is 10 seconds

property.name: text
property.value: You Need To Go OutSide

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF6600]Player's Mind:[-] I need to go outside, so the zombies can see me. After that, I can go back inside.

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF6600]Game Tip:[-] Your Party Needs To Shoot The Arrow At The Same Time

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF6600]Player's Mind:[-] Why there is another horde ?

property.name: text
property.value: Wave 4 Finished

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF6600]Player's Mind:[-] Oh shit! I'm still alive

property.name: text
property.value: Cant't activate

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF6600]Player's Mind:[-] Cant't activate, there are zombies nearby

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF6600]Player's Mind:[-] An Ambush

property.name: text
property.value: Waiting the remaining partners

property.name: text
property.value: Wave 1 Finished

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF6600]Player's Mind:[-] I've finished the first wave

property.name: text
property.value: Wave 2 Finished

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF6600]Player's Mind:[-] I've finished the second wave

property.value: Wave 3 Finished

property.value: | [FF6600]Player's Mind:[-] I've finished the third wave

property.value: | [FF6600]Player's Mind:[-] I've finished the first wave
